Welcome

This one file website was built from your manuscript and prepared for direct GitHub upload. The translator name appears at the top, the full English translation is embedded locally in this file, and the Arabic is loaded live for each surah so the reading view shows Arabic first and English beneath. The manuscript sections, including the preface, introduction, glossary, thematic master index, and publisher note, are also included.

Arabic is loaded from a public Qur’an source when you open a surah. The English text is embedded from your manuscript in this one file.

The English Qur’an, translation by A. K. Khan.
